samples.text: All violins are string instruments. All string instruments are musical instruments. Are violins musical instruments?
Every member of violins is among string instruments. Every member of string instruments is among musical instruments. Does it follow that violins are musical instruments?
All concert violins are bowed instruments. All bowed instruments are musical instruments. Are concert violins musical instruments?
musical instruments include all string instruments. string instruments include all violins. Therefore, are violins musical instruments?
All violins are string instruments. All string instruments are musical instruments. This topic was discussed last week. Are violins musical instruments?
